DP.167.0000:
I’m using Technical Machines to teach
moves to my Pokémon.\f
I’m trying for different mixes of
moves in different types.\f
I hear the Elite Four of the Pokémon
League are way tougher than any\r
Gym Leader.
DP.167.0001:
If your Pokémon gets frozen, it will
thaw out after a while.\f
But if I were you, I’d keep some
Ice Heals around.
